title: Adultery: HP High Court rejects man's plea for release of married woman with whom he was in live-in relationship
description: The Himachal Pradesh High Court recently dismissed a habeas corpus petition filed by a man seeking the release of a married woman with whom he was allegedly in a live-in relationship.In an order passed on May 14, a Bench of Chief Justice GS Sandhawalia and Justice Bipin Chander Negi held that the petition was not maintainable since the woman was living with her husband and child.The Court said it could not interfere in matrimonial disputes between spouses through habeas corpus proceedings."We ar
